ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Training data used for the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the model was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID that created the model */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID that updated the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES model_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_model_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_type_id") REFERENCES model_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the model type (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used in the experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID that created the experiment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID that updated the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., pending, running, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the result was obtained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "train_accuracy" REAL /* Training accuracy */,
  "val_accuracy" REAL /* Validation accuracy */,
  "train_recall" REAL /* Training recall */,
  "val_recall" REAL /* Validation recall */,
  "train_precision" REAL /* Training precision */,
  "val_precision" REAL /* Validation precision */,
  "train_f1_score" REAL /* Training F1-score */,
  "val_f1_score" REAL /* Validation F1-score */,
  "run_time" REAL /* Run time */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was obtained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the hyperparameter was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the hyperparameter was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model or experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model or experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, run) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_tags_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_tags_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
